# Project overview - Mastermind

You are to mastermind game as a .NET C# console application. Use two projects in the solution: the game implementation and an xUnit test project. Implement the typical mastermind game where the player has to guess a secret code of colored pegs. The game should provide feedback on the player's guesses, indicating how many pegs are the correct color and in the correct position, and how many are the correct color but in the wrong position. The player wins by guessing the code within a certain number of attempts.
